target: 37. Uninvited Visitor?

I'm home!
Sorry, Mio. I'm late…

Ah~
Welcome back, Shin-chan…
What are you doing in the kitchen?
You'll see if you look~

There was onion and chicken in the fridge,
so I thought I'd stir-fry it…

When I was cutting the onion,
tears started flowing and I couldn't see anything…

Hey, that's dangerous!
Don't rub your eyes with the knife!
Ugh, but…
(What?)
(Up until now, there's never been a scenario where Mio cooks!!)

(This is bad. The future is changing and I can't predict it.
I need to get back to the usual flow…)

I'll make dinner!
Why is this…?

Shin-chan, you look unwell this morning…
So, um…

I wanted to make something for you…
Guh…
(This person… for my sake…)
…I see.

Thank you… but leave it to me.
I can't stand to see you in danger!

Wha-?!
But…

(No need to worry.
I'm already fine.
Come on, lend me the knife.)
(The shadow hates contact with the ground's body…)
(I think I'm fine, but to be safe, step on Mio's shadow…)
…Go wash your face!
(Good… Mio isn't a shadow yet)
(But what was that person trying to make?)

(Potatoes, onions, chicken…
Can I still change it to curry?)
(Gosh… she has her cute side…)

(…No way, Shinpei!!
Different developments are bad!!)

(Ah… right.
Because of me, Mio's actions
have already changed)

(I'll make curry.
That's the same action as before.)

(Well, considering that Nagumo-sensei and the others
are armed and waiting outside,
it's already completely different from before…)

(Anyway, I need to avoid any actions
other than "killing the shadow")

(In particular, if someone sees, hears, or feeds
the content, it could change people's actions…

That would cause a chain reaction,
making the future change significantly.
If that happens, the future I saw
would be useless)

(If it leads to a better future, that's fine,
but I can't be that optimistic)

Hey, Mio.
You're really hungry…
Are you that hungry?
Huh?
…Yeah.

Oh!
Could it be, tonight's curry?
Shinpei's curry!?

…
Ah… Ahh… Ahh…
Mio!!?!

(…No, no!!
It's not Mio… it's the shadow 'Ushio'!!)

Again…!
You look like you saw a ghost!!

But you…
Why!?

Why are you here?
It should be the 24th's festival…

Huh!?
Why do you know that!?
Huh…?

Ah…
Shinpei…
You might not believe me,
but listen carefully!
Something terrible will happen on the 24th!!!

It'll be a black shadow-like monster…
Everyone will be swallowed and disappear!!!

…Wait, you.
Could it be… you're also…
That festival… you came from there!!!

…Huh!?
Could it be Shinpei also!?

Ah~…
After washing with water, it's a bit better…

…Huh?
Why is Shin-chan sitting in the kitchen…

N-no…!
Nothing!
(Stay calm… here…)

(Mio can't see Ushio hiding here…
I need to stay hidden…)
W-What!?

Could it be… this smell…
Curry??
Y-Yes! Correct!

Wow~!
That's a good idea~!!
(Oh no… Ushio's stomach noise…)

Haha!
Shin-chan, your stomach's so loud~
You're like an older sister!

Good…
If you're hungry, you're healthy!
I-I guess…

(Calm down, calm down.
Don't forget the curry steps!)

(Chop the onion finely.
Grate garlic and ginger.
Dice the tomato…)

…Well then…
Next, I'll fry the chicken!!!

(Oh no… this situation is really bad…
I need to get Ushio out of here somehow…)

(So… right! The memo!
I'll send a message to Ushio through this…)
(Ugh, why is this happening…)

(Nagumo-sensei…
This isn't just a "different development"…
It's way beyond that!!)

Sorry, Shinpei, I'm late!
Karikiri-san talked for too long…

O-Oh, you're back, Alain…
It'll be ready soon.
Dad, you're back!

Ah, welcome back… Mio!
You should help too, you know.
I'm just here to eat!!

Honestly…
Huh, that smells good.
That's Mio's favorite…

(Ushio! Pay attention!
Look at this memo!)

(In five minutes, Alain will go to the bathroom,
and Mio will go to the toilet--)

(Use that chance to go to my room.
Don't get caught!!)
…Got it.

O-Oh…
It's done…
Wow, it smells good~
You've really improved, Shinpei.

I-I guess so?
Well, let's serve it before it gets cold…

(Alain and Mio are moving as expected,
and Ushio went to my room…)

(I'll go back to my room
as if nothing happened)

Huh?
Where are you going, Shin-chan?

Ah…
I'll just eat in my room…

…Huh?
You're carrying two plates!?

I-I…
No, really, I'm super hungry!!!

Haha! I'm already fine…
Hahaha~
Ushio…
Curry!

Curry! Curry!
Curry~!!!

Hmph!
Hmph!!

(This… this is…
The rhythm of curry!!)

(The more Mio wants curry,
the more she gets excited with this weird ritual!)
(Gosh… why is this happening!!!)
Don't let the shadow's appearance and words move you, Shinpei Ajiro.

Even if they appear as friends or family…
Even if they appear as someone you love,
you mustn't hesitate.

(I know.
Otherwise, it's all over…)
(When the real Ushio appears before me…)

(I'll stab it with the fruit knife I've been hiding…
!)

Hey, Shinpei.
Can I eat it?
…Yeah…
